steps.title: Step 1
steps.content: The rental cost has two parts: a flat fee of \$920 for the first 3 hours, plus \$35 for each additional hour beyond those 3 hours.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.content: With $t$ total hours ($t \gt 3$), the extra hours are $(t - 3)$. Total cost = $920 + 35(t - 3)$. Setting this equal to \$1,130: $920 + 35(t - 3) = 1{,}130$.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.content: Verify structure: the \$920 is fixed, not multiplied by $t$ or $3t$. The extra charge applies only to hours beyond 3, i.e., $(t-3)$ hours, not $3t$ hours.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.content:
• A ${920}(t - 3) + 35t = 1{,}130$: multiplies the flat fee by $(t-3)$, which is incorrect. Eliminated.
  • B ${920}(3t) + 35t = 1{,}130$: multiplies the flat fee by $3t$, which is incorrect. Eliminated.
  • C $920 + 35(t - 3) = 1{,}130$: flat \$920 plus \$35 per extra hour. That confirms C is correct.
  • D $920 + 35(3t) = 1{,}130$: uses $3t$ instead of $(t - 3)$ for the extra hours. Eliminated.
